items.name: utils
items.title: cn() utility
items.description: clsx + tailwind-merge className helper.

items.name: tokens
items.title: Design tokens (--ds-*)
items.description: Generated 3-layer token CSS (primitives + component tokens + brand semantics). Brand-switchable via [data-theme] on <html>.

items.name: theme
items.title: Kraken theme mapping
items.description: Maps shadcn semantic vars (--primary, --background, …) onto the --ds-* tokens + @theme inline. Depends on `tokens`.

items.name: ai-foundations
items.title: AI foundations (machine-readable rules)
items.description: Always-on design-system rules for AI agents — token architecture, brand contract, conventions, shadcn divergences. Generated from design.md + MAPPING.md; the MCP server (@kraken-ui/mcp) serves the same data on demand.
